title: Data archive for "A mechanism of synergistic Mediator recruitment in RNA polymerase II transcription activation revealed by single-molecule fluorescence"
author: Zhou, Daniel
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This data archive contains the source data and data analysis code for the peer-reviewed journal article "A mechanism of synergistic Mediator recruitment in RNA polymerase II transcription activation revealed by single-molecule fluorescence" which is in press at  Molecular Cell
steps_raw: This data archive contains the source data and data analysis code for the peer-reviewed journal article "A mechanism of synergistic Mediator recruitment in RNA polymerase II transcription activation revealed by single-molecule fluorescence" which is in press at  Molecular Cell
